name: derek-dev-website
description: Personal dev website for Derek Roemhildt

scripts.build: pnpm --filter ui build && pnpm --filter infra build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter ui exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter infra typecheck
scripts.synth: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter infra exec cdk synth --profile DRoemhildt19
scripts.diff: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter infra exec cdk diff --profile DRoemhildt19
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter infra exec cdk deploy --require-approval never --profile DRoemhildt19
scripts.destroy: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter infra exec cdk destroy --force --profile DRoemhildt19
